exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Holding at 60kg — primary compound. Hip hinge, bar close to legs, back neutral throughout. Log all 4 sets.

exercises.name: Walking Lunges
exercises.notes: Holding at 14kg per hand. 10 reps per leg. Knee just above floor, drive through front heel.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Holding at 37kg. Slow 3-second eccentric. Full curl, control the descent.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Holding at 35kg. Full extension, hold top for 1 second. Don't rush.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Holding at 40kg. Targets soleus. Full range — deep stretch, full squeeze at top.
